mapper.insert: INSERT INTO toss_webhook_log ( payment_key, order_id, event_type, status, amount, webhook_payload, processed, error_message, created_at ) VALUES ( #{paymentKey}, #{orderId}, #{eventType}, #{status}, #{amount}, #{webhookPayload}, FALSE, NULL, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM toss_webhook_log WHERE processed = FALSE AND error_message IS NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE toss_webhook_log SET processed = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE toss_webhook_log SET error_message = #{errorMessage} WHERE id = #{id}
